caption: In a large, dimly lit hall with recessed ceiling lighting and ornate chandeliers, several individuals are practicing martial arts. A central figure wears a bright yellow traditional outfit and performs dynamic movements. To the left, a person in blue attire moves across the floor, while another person in a blue shirt and jeans stands behind them. In the background, a seated audience watches the demonstration. As the sequence progresses, the person in yellow shifts their stance and position, executing a series of strikes or forms. Simultaneously, a person on the far right, wearing blue, enters the scene wielding a long staff, engaging in a synchronized movement with the central figure. The practitioners move fluidly across the blue carpeted floor, with their positions shifting relative to one another as they perform their respective routines.
